name: aggregator rejects two plugin-namespace files declaring the same rule id (authoring error)
setup:
cat > tree/google/first.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g1
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g1
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-10T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g1
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any
    description: First declaration.
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF

cat > tree/google/second.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g2
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g2
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-10T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g2
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    name: no-any-redux
    description: Second declaration of same id (authoring error).
    detector: rubric/detectors/no-any.sh
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
all_set: [g-ts-001]
EOF
